title: Small commercial production company

posts.author: HP_PI (Helen Power)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We are a small commercials production company based in London looking for some pros to help advise us.

We are 4 x full-time + 3-4 freelancers at most times ) a mix of in-office and remote working. We use a mix of slack, google sheets, g-cal and Monday.com and frame.io for project managing, costing tracking budgets and coms.

Looking for a consultation with someone pro at all these software to be able to advise on how we can integrate and be most efficient in our use of all these systems and see where we might streamline and centralise how we’re working.

If this is something you might be able to help with i would love to chat and get an idea of costs etc. Ideally someone who’s familiar with Media/film production company needs.
Thank you!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @HP_PI and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

This sounds like something the team at CarbonWeb can help with something just like this. We offer a consultation package for a one-time fee that will you 4, one hour meetings with a member of my team to discuss something just like this. From there we also offer custom development through our Professional Services.

As a Channel Partner with monday.com we are always looking for ways to help members of the community.

If you’d like to have an initial call with me to discuss our consulting services more please schedule here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get going!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @HP_PI ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out. At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing Project Management solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can help you optimize your workflow and keep track of all projects from start to finish, streamline your communications and ensure proper budget overview.

We also have a wealth of experience in creating both custom and native integrations, and can ensure that they are utilized to their fullest potential in optimizing your workflow by integrating with any other software you might use.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements! Alternatively, if none of the available time slots work out for you, please contact us at info@thespelas.com so we can do our best to accommodate you.

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
